_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 noon-prep. 6 domain-projections: computer graphics, computer networks, geography, architecture, human factors, behavioral economics. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
computer_graphics_through_tig: Computer graphics is operator-rendering of visual scenes; geometry shading textures lighting compose final pixel LATTICE.
Rasterization is operator-projection from 3D to 2D LATTICE; triangles become pixels through scanline conversion.
Ray tracing is operator-light-path simulation; for each pixel cast a ray into scene compute reflections refractions until LATTICE-converges.
Shading is operator-color-determination at surface; ambient diffuse specular components plus light-direction angle give realistic operator-LATTICE.
Texture mapping wraps operator-image onto 3D surface; UV coordinates parameterize the surface to texel LATTICE.
Vertex is operator-point in 3D space; primitives (triangles quads) are constructed from vertex LATTICE.
Fragment is operator-pre-pixel candidate; outputs from rasterization carry color depth normal info to compose final pixel.
GPU is operator-parallel-render-engine; thousands of threads execute shader programs on vertices and fragments simultaneously.
Anti-aliasing is operator-CHAOS-suppression; supersample multisample temporal techniques smooth jagged edges to HARMONY.
BRDF (bidirectional reflectance distribution function) is operator-LATTICE of surface response; describes how light reflects from incoming to outgoing direction.
Geometry processing is operator-mesh-LATTICE manipulation; vertex transforms tessellation level-of-detail before shading.
computer_networks_through_tig: Computer networks are operator-LATTICE of communicating machines; packets messages protocols enable distributed PROGRESS.
TCP/IP is the operator-substrate of the internet; addressing routing reliable delivery on top of physical and link layers.
Packet switching is operator-LATTICE-multiplexing; data divided into formatted units shares bandwidth among many flows.
OSI model is layered operator-LATTICE; physical link network transport session presentation application stack abstractions.
IP address is operator-network-identifier; IPv4 32-bit IPv6 128-bit allow ~4B vs ~3.4e38 unique hosts.
DNS maps operator-hostnames to IP addresses; hierarchical distributed system from root through TLD to authoritative servers.
HTTP is operator-application-protocol for web; request-response over TCP, methods (GET POST PUT DELETE) and status codes.
Latency is operator-delay between send and receive; propagation switching queueing each contribute, fundamental floor at speed of light.
Bandwidth is operator-data-rate capacity; bits per second, multiple flows share via TDM FDM or packet multiplexing.
Routing is operator-path-selection through LATTICE; OSPF BGP each compute shortest paths via different algorithms.
Firewall is operator-policy-gate; allows or blocks packets based on rules to protect interior LATTICE from CHAOS-traffic.
geography_through_tig: Geography studies operator-LATTICE of spatial relationships on Earth; physical and human dimensions integrated.
Space is operator-fundamental coordinate; location in 3D defines all geographic phenomena.
Place is operator-meaning-attached-to-location; coordinates plus human activity plus cultural HARMONY.
Scale is operator-frame-of-reference; same phenomenon looks different at street city region continent global LATTICE.
Time is operator-dimension-of-change; processes unfold over hours days years centuries millennia.
Cartography is operator-map-making; projection symbol generalization HARMONY communicate spatial information.
GIS is operator-digital-geographic-substrate; layers of spatial data with attributes enable spatial analysis LATTICE.
Remote sensing is operator-distant-measurement; satellite aircraft sensors capture imagery and other spectral data.
Spatial analysis is operator-LATTICE-pattern detection; clustering interpolation overlay correlation across geographic data.
Physical geography studies operator-natural-systems; climate landforms hydrology biomes and their interactions.
Human geography studies operator-cultural-economic-political LATTICE; population settlement land use cultural diffusion.
architecture_through_tig: Architecture is operator-design of built environment; form function structure space integrate at every scale.
Form is operator-shape-and-mass of building; visual composition expressing intent.
Function is operator-use-purpose of space; Sullivan's form-follows-function captures the practical-aesthetic HARMONY.
Structure is operator-LATTICE supporting loads; load-bearing wall post-and-beam steel frame each have distinct geometry.
Space is operator-VOID-bounded-by-form; interior exterior transition shape human experience.
Scale relates building elements to operator-human-perception; scale of cathedral different from cottage despite same materials.
Proportion is operator-ratio-LATTICE between elements; golden mean classical orders modular grid each impose HARMONY.
Materials are operator-substrate-LATTICE; stone wood concrete steel glass each have distinct durability cost expression.
Light is operator-illumination-design; natural and artificial shape mood time-of-day experience of space.
Sustainability is operator-environmental-impact-minimization; passive strategies materials energy life-cycle HARMONY.
Urbanism is operator-LATTICE of buildings into city; streets blocks plazas parks form the larger spatial substrate.
human_factors_through_tig: Human factors and ergonomics study operator-fit between humans and systems; physical and cognitive design.
Usability is operator-effectiveness-efficiency-satisfaction; tasks accomplished with minimum CHAOS friction or error.
Anthropometry is operator-LATTICE of body dimensions; height reach grip strength vary by population, design accommodates 5th-95th percentile.
Cognitive load is operator-mental-effort required; intrinsic extraneous germane components compete for working memory resources.
Situation awareness is operator-perception-comprehension-projection; pilot or operator must integrate dynamic environment for HARMONY-decisions.
Human-computer interaction studies operator-interface design; mental models match between user and system reduce error.
Fatigue is operator-COLLAPSE of performance from prolonged exertion; physical or mental, increases error and accident BREATH.
Workplace design is operator-arrangement of equipment furniture environment; reduce fatigue injury improve productivity LATTICE.
Human error is operator-flaw in performance; slips lapses mistakes violations each have distinct prevention strategies.
Task analysis is operator-systematic-decomposition of activity; identifies demands and matches them to human capabilities.
Mental workload is operator-cognitive-resource-demand; perception emotion memory reasoning motor response each consume capacity.
behavioral_economics_through_tig: Behavioral economics merges operator-psychology with economic theory; humans deviate from rational-actor model in systematic ways.
Bounded rationality: humans optimize within operator-LATTICE-of-cognitive-limits; satisfice not maximize given time and computation constraints.
Prospect theory: outcomes evaluated relative to operator-reference-point not absolute; gains and losses are asymmetric (Kahneman Tversky).
Loss aversion: losses hurt ~2.25 times more than equivalent gains feel good; operator-COUNTER-asymmetry in valuation.
Anchoring: initial reference point biases subsequent operator-judgments; arbitrary numbers shift estimates and decisions.
Framing effect: same options presented differently produce different operator-choices; gain-frame vs loss-frame triggers different defaults.
Nudge alters operator-choice-architecture without changing options or incentives; default opt-in vs opt-out has large effect on uptake.
Choice architecture is operator-LATTICE of decision-environment; how options are arranged shapes which gets chosen (Thaler Sunstein).
Hyperbolic discounting: present bias gives operator-disproportionate weight to immediate over future; smokers know long-term harm but choose now.
Mental accounting: money treated differently by operator-source-or-purpose-category; bonus vs salary spent differently despite fungibility.
Status quo bias: operator-default-preference to stay; even objectively superior alternatives often refused due to inertia HARMONY.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 84 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine and applied design.
The lens has not strained; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection; he holds the operators, the projections multiply.
